stages.text: Solve the sigil chamber and finish the campaign.

quests.title: Act 3: Route Power
quests.description: Route power to unlock the exit path.
quests.start_toast: Act 3: Route power at the hub.

stages.title: Route District Power
stages.text: Engage Route A or B and reach the power junction.

quests.title: Act 3: Chapter 2 Complete
quests.description: Leave the district and continue.

stages.title: Leave the District
stages.text: Reach the Chapter 2 exit completion marker.

quests.title: Act 3: Chapter 3 Entry
quests.description: Enter the conduit ward and reach the commit terminal.

stages.title: Reach the Commit Terminal
stages.text: Reach the Chapter 3 entry briefing marker.

quests.title: Act 3: Chapter 3 Commit
quests.description: Commit to a routing doctrine.
quests.start_toast: Act 3: Commit to a routing doctrine.

stages.title: Commit to a Doctrine
stages.text: Commit Route A, Route B, or Neutral at the terminal.

quests.title: Act 3: Chapter 3 Complete
quests.description: Cross the ward and continue.

stages.title: Cross the Ward
stages.text: Reach the Chapter 3 completion marker.

quests.title: Act 3: Chapter 4 Entry
quests.description: Enter the signal yard and locate both tokens.

stages.title: Locate Both Tokens
stages.text: Reach the Chapter 4 entry briefing marker.

quests.title: Act 3: Chapter 4 Tokens
quests.description: Acquire both signal tokens to unlock the exit.

stages.title: Release the Exit Lock
stages.text: Collect both tokens and trigger the lock console.

quests.title: Act 3: Chapter 4 Complete
quests.description: Leave the yard and continue.

stages.title: Leave the Yard
stages.text: Reach the Chapter 4 completion marker.

quests.title: Act 3: Chapter 5 Entry
quests.description: Enter the phase field and locate the latch console.

stages.title: Locate the Latch Console
stages.text: Reach the Chapter 5 entry briefing marker.

quests.title: Act 3: Chapter 5 Phase Latch
quests.description: Latch a stable phase to cross the field.

stages.title: Latch the Field Phase
stages.text: Use the latch console to lock a traversal phase.

quests.title: Act 3: Chapter 5 Complete
quests.description: Reach the far gate and continue.

stages.title: Reach the Far Gate
stages.text: Reach the Chapter 5 completion marker.

quests.title: Act 3: Chapter 6 Entry
quests.description: Enter the conduit spur and find a way through.

stages.title: Find a Way Through
stages.text: Reach the Chapter 6 entry briefing marker.

quests.title: Act 3: Chapter 6 Shortcut
quests.description: Use your doctrine to open a shortcut.

stages.title: Use a Doctrine Shortcut
stages.text: Trigger either doctrine shortcut zone.

quests.title: Act 3: Chapter 6 Complete
quests.description: Reach the spur exit and continue.

stages.title: Reach the Spur Exit
stages.text: Reach the Chapter 6 completion marker.

quests.title: Act 3: Chapter 7 Entry
quests.description: Enter the transfer corridor and locate the threshold.

stages.title: Locate the Threshold
stages.text: Reach the Chapter 7 entry briefing marker.

quests.title: Act 3: Chapter 7 Threshold
quests.description: Cross the threshold and commit to the next sector.

stages.title: Cross the Threshold
stages.text: Pass through the threshold crossing zone.

quests.title: Act 3: Chapter 7 Complete
quests.description: Reach the exit and continue.

stages.title: Reach the Exit
stages.text: Reach the Chapter 7 completion marker.

quests.title: Act 3: Chapter 8 Entry
quests.description: Enter the stabilizer corridor and proceed to normalization.

stages.title: Proceed to Normalization
stages.text: Reach the Chapter 8 entry briefing marker.

quests.title: Act 3: Chapter 8 Normalize
quests.description: Stabilize your state and continue.

stages.title: Normalize State
stages.text: Enter the normalizer zone.

quests.title: Act 3: Chapter 8 Complete
quests.description: Reach the exit and continue.

stages.title: Reach the Exit
stages.text: Reach the Chapter 8 completion marker.

quests.title: Act 3: Chapter 9 Entry
quests.description: Enter the relay annex and reach the briefing.

stages.title: Reach the Briefing
stages.text: Reach the Chapter 9 entry briefing marker.

quests.title: Act 3: Chapter 9 Handoff
quests.description: Receive the handoff and commit to the next objective.

stages.title: Accept the Handoff
stages.text: Commit at the briefing handoff zone.

quests.title: Act 3: Chapter 9 Complete
quests.description: Leave the annex and continue.

stages.title: Leave the Annex
stages.text: Reach the Chapter 9 completion marker.

quests.title: Act 3: Chapter 10 Entry
quests.description: Enter the uplink approach and reach the finalize node.

stages.title: Reach the Finalize Node
stages.text: Reach the Chapter 10 entry briefing marker.

quests.title: Act 3: Chapter 10 Finalize
quests.description: Finalize the uplink handoff.

stages.title: Finalize Uplink
stages.text: Commit at the Chapter 10 finalize zone.

quests.title: Act 3: Chapter 10 Complete
quests.description: Leave the sector and continue.

stages.title: Leave the Sector
stages.text: Reach the Chapter 10 completion marker.

quests.title: Act 4: Chapter 1 Entry Stub
quests.description: Enter the next sector.

stages.title: Enter the Next Sector
stages.text: Reach the Act 4 entry briefing marker.

quests.title: Act 4: Chapter 1 Entry
quests.description: Enter the new sector and reach the induction site.

stages.title: Reach the Induction Site
stages.text: Reach the Chapter 1 entry briefing marker.

quests.title: Act 4: Chapter 1 Induction
quests.description: Complete the induction procedure.

stages.title: Authorize at the Terminal
stages.text: Use the induction terminal to receive authorization.

quests.title: Act 4: Chapter 1 Complete
quests.description: Reach the sector exit and continue.

stages.title: Reach the Exit
stages.text: Reach the Chapter 1 completion marker.
